text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a small mountain of fan letters arrives
for Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Are... Are all of these for me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ich bin so glücklich... I mean, I feel so very happy.
How I wish I could show this to my parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I must reply to each and every one.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Worry not, I will maintain my schedule
perfectly even as I pour my heart into my
responses.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Flash, you ate really fast today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. I must use my time efficiently so I can—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! You said you were going to reply to
your fan mail. I remember now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"I've been rooting for you since your debut."
...Wow! This fan has spectated all of my races thus
far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm so touched. I must do my utmost to continue
being a runner worthy of their support.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although... simply voicing my thoughts will not
do. I must properly convey my gratitude in my
written response.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now Falcon, I'd like you to try using this formula
to solve the problem. I'll give you fifteen minutes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, please excuse me. I have some
reading to do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: B-but we're in the middle of a study session!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Gasp! This letter is in German. Perhaps it was written by a German who is living in Japan, just like me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Your running brings pride to our country." Hehe.
What an honor.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what I mean is... I'm amazed, Flash! You
actually replied to all your letters in a week!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? More?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I fear to ask you this, but could it be the
box you're carrying is full of...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Are those all fan letters?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize that my racing had caught the
attention of so many people...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This is so cool! I'm so proud of you!
choice_data_list: Are you going to reply to all of these too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. It is my duty to respond to their
enthusiasm in kind.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Each of the fan letters I received the other day
was filled with the writer's warmth and
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wish with all my heart to convey just how equally
grateful I am to them.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! You really are something else! I could learn
a thing or two from you as an Umadol!
